body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-57442", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-538", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Externally-Accessible File or Directory"}], "description": "PathFilter's deny-list glob patterns are anchored, so `.git`, `.obsidian`, and `node_modules` were only blocked at the vault root. Nested copies inside the vault (e.g. `tools/cli/node_modules/...`, `tools/somerepo/.git/config`, a nested `.obsidian/`) were fully traversable via isAllowed/isAllowedForListing. Impact: a nested `.git/config` (remote URLs / embedded tokens) and nested `.obsidian` contents could be read, under the same prompt-injection threat model as GHSA-j99q-93c9-h869 (an attacker influences the path an agent reads). It also caused nested `node_modules` to pollute the tag index (#128, the public symptom). Fixed in 0.11.5 by denying these restricted names at any path depth (matched case-insensitively as any path segment).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:42:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-57442"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:42:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault/security/advisories/GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/bitbonsai/mcpvault/security-advisories/GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault", "summary": "MCPVault: PathFilter restricted directories (.git/.obsidian/node_modules) only denied at vault root, not nested", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T21:31:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9c83-rr99-vfwj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.11.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@bitbonsai/mcpvault"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.11.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MCPVault: PathFilter restricted directories (.git/.obsidian/node_modules) only denied at vault root, not nested
